scanner_rust_line_rangesState.description: State model derived from scanner_rust_line_ranges TLA+ spec

LineNumberCorrect.message:
LineNumberCorrect violation: \A s \in skeletons :
        /\ s.line_num >= 1
        /\ s.line_num <= N
        /\ Lines[s.line_num] = "Fn"
LineNumberCorrect.description: Verifier for invariant LineNumberCorrect from scanner_rust_line_ranges spec

TraitExclusion.message:

            Lines[j] = "TraitOpen" /\
            ~(\E ...
TraitExclusion.description: Verifier for invariant TraitExclusion from scanner_rust_line_ranges spec

NoGaps.message:
NoGaps violation: i > N =>
        \A k \in 1..N :
            (Lines[k] = "Fn" /\ ~InTrait(k)) =>
                \E s \in skeletons :...
NoGaps.description: Verifier for invariant NoGaps from scanner_rust_line_ranges spec

CursorBounded.description: Verifier for invariant CursorBounded from scanner_rust_line_ranges spec

assert_LineNumberCorrect.condition:
\A s in skeletons :
        and s.line_num >= 1
        and s.line_num <= N
        and Lines[s.line_num] = "Fn"
assert_LineNumberCorrect.message:
Assertion failed: LineNumberCorrect — \A s \in skeletons :
        /\ s.line_num >= 1
        /\ s.line_num <= N
        /\ Lines[s.line_num] = "Fn"
assert_LineNumberCorrect.description: Test assertion for LineNumberCorrect from scanner_rust_line_ranges spec

assert_TraitExclusion.condition:
\A s in skeletons :
        ~(\E j in 1..(s.line_num - 1) :
            Lines[j] = "TraitOpen" and
            ~(\E m in (j+1)..(s.line_num - 1) : Lines[m] = "CloseBrace"))
assert_TraitExclusion.message:
Assertion failed: TraitExclusion — \A s \in skeletons :
        ~(\E j \in 1..(s.line_num - 1) :
            Lines[j] = "TraitOpen" /\
            ~(\E ...
assert_TraitExclusion.description: Test assertion for TraitExclusion from scanner_rust_line_ranges spec

assert_NoGaps.condition:
i > N implies
        \A k in 1..N :
            (Lines[k] = "Fn" and ~InTrait(k)) implies
                \E s in skeletons : s.line_num = k
assert_NoGaps.message:
Assertion failed: NoGaps — i > N =>
        \A k \in 1..N :
            (Lines[k] = "Fn" /\ ~InTrait(k)) =>
                \E s \in skeletons :...
